body: Completed the Grand Plan task to rewrite scripts/trinity_signal_intake.py. The intake script is now a single-pass script that safely processes structured metadata from the Windows signal probe or stdin, strips out any raw text/notification bodies, and appends valid signals to the quota events ledger. The old daemon logic (with while True) was removed, and the duplicate 	rinity_signal_probe_intake.py script was deleted. All 419 tests pass successfully.
